article.p: MetaOWL includes a full-featured translation system with pluralization, interpolation, and locale switching.

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Call I18n.load() once before boot(), typically in src/metaowl.js:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Use I18n.t() in JavaScript and OWL templates:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code: <!-- In OWL templates --> <h1 t-esc="I18n.t('welcome', { name: state.username })"/> <span t-esc="I18n.t('items', { count: state.cartItems })"/>

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Switch locale at runtime — MetaOWL re-renders affected components automatically:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
pre.code:
import { I18n } from 'metaowl'
await I18n.setLocale('en') console.log(I18n.locale) // "en"

h2.style: font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--doc-heading-color); margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px;

article.p: Format numbers and dates using locale-aware helpers:

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;

article.p: Define custom number and date formats in I18n.load():

pre.style: padding: 16px; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 24px;
